detail: Stack: Python 3.13 + FastAPI + pytest + ollama proxy. Agent loop with planner/executor/verifier pattern already exists.

agent-state.json, NEXT_ACTION.md, checkpoint.jsonl written
Created CLAUDE.md (root), agent/CLAUDE.md, router/CLAUDE.md

Created 11 skills: implementation-planner, test-first-executor, changelog-enforcer, council-review, risky-module-review, release-readiness, docs-sync, cooldown-resume, dependency-audit, repo-memory-updater, modularity-review
Created .claude/hooks/pre-commit, commit-msg, pre-push. Upgraded .githooks/prepare-commit-msg. Created Makefile.
Created .github/workflows/ci.yml, changelog-check.yml, PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md, CODEOWNERS, Makefile

simulation: step-two completed after resume

scripts/ai_runner.py created. Simulation test PASSED: checkpoint→cooldown→resume→no-duplicates

Created docs/architecture/overview.md, agent-orchestration.md, docs/runbooks/auto-resume.md, release.md, docs/adrs/001-003, docs/admin/github-branch-protection.md
simulation: step-one completed before interruption
All 20 key files verified. Syntax checks pass. Manifest OK. Audit clean. Simulation PASS. Resume test PASS with isolated state.
Implemented Claude Code–style Web UI + Admin app (providers/workspaces/commands), removed Vercel config, added Dockerfile + Cloud Run docs, and updated agent/provider support. pytest -x PASS.
Reverted web UI + cloud deploy work; removed Vercel artifacts and documentation references.
Restored built-in Web UI + Admin app without Vercel-specific artifacts or documentation references.
Fetched/pulled origin/master; created working branch codex/hf-ollama-providers.
Installed deps in .venv; fixed browser automation hang; python -m pytest -x: 250 passed.

Identified primary web UI at frontend/ (runs on :3000) backed by backend/server.py (FastAPI + Mongo). Provider CRUD exists but HF/OpenAI-compat calls are broken (no auth header, wrong /models path, emergentintegrations import). Proxy has separate webui/ but agent providers are OpenAI-compat only.

Ran dashboard locally: frontend on :3000, backend on :8001, Ollama on :11434. Logged in as admin@llmrelay.local and sent chat via provider ollama-local using model tinyllama:latest. Verified /api/providers and /api/providers/{id}/models. HF chat returns 401 with guidance when token missing.
Forwarded the caller API key to same-origin provider URLs during agent runs and added a regression test for Ollama-backed sessions behind the proxy.
